title: Navigation Links — Connecting Pages
description: Add a navigation bar at the top of your portfolio with anchor links that jump to each section. Create links pointing to #about, #projects, and #contact. Add matching id attributes to each section's h2 or a wrapping div so the links have targets.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 4: Navigation Links # Add a nav section with anchor links and id attributes on sections. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

Welcome to my portfolio!

About Me

I am a developer who is passionate about building things. I am constantly learning and love problem-solving.

My Projects

Here are some of my recent projects.

Contact

Get in touch with me.

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '<a ' in html.lower(), 'Must include anchor <a> elements for navigation'
assert 'href="#about"' in html.lower() or "href='#about'" in html.lower(), 'Must include a link to href="#about"'
assert 'href="#projects"' in html.lower() or "href='#projects'" in html.lower(), 'Must include a link to href="#projects"'
assert 'href="#contact"' in html.lower() or "href='#contact'" in html.lower(), 'Must include a link to href="#contact"'
assert 'id="about"' in html.lower() or "id='about'" in html.lower(), 'Must include id="about" on the About section'
assert 'id="projects"' in html.lower() or "id='projects'" in html.lower(), 'Must include id="projects" on the Projects section'
assert 'id="contact"' in html.lower() or "id='contact'" in html.lower(), 'Must include id="contact" on the Contact section'
acceptance_criteria: Navigation section with anchor links is at the top
Each target section has a matching id attribute
hints: Create a link like: About Me
Add an id to a section: <div id="about"> or <h2 id="about">
Put all nav links together at the top of the body
